	}

@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
    .page-id-237017 .contact-form,
    .page-id-237017 .contact-form-col,
    .page-id-237017 .form-col,
    .page-id-506 .contact-form,
    .page-id-506 .contact-form-col,

        max-width: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        padding-right: 0;
        padding-left: 0;
        margin-right: 0;
        margin-left: 0;

    .page-id-506 .wpcf7-form {
        max-width: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    
    .page-id-237017 .wpcf7-checkbox,
    .page-id-237017 .wpcf7-radio,
    .page-id-506 .wpcf7-checkbox,

    }

        box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    
    .page-id-237017 .row,

        margin: 0;
        width: 100%;
    }
    
    .page-id-237017 .col-sm-12,
    .page-id-506 .col-sm-12 {
        padding: 0;
    }

    .page-id-237017 .form-btn-wrapper,

        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;

<section class="comprehensive">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="comprehensive-tab-content">
            <h2> Comprehensive Treatment Options</h2>
            <p>Gateway offers a full continuum of care across a wide range of clinical settings, so no matter where a patient is in life or recovery, we have a program that can be personalized for them. It’s care that stays for life.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="accordion hidden-lg">
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/house.svg" class="img-svg" alt="house">
                                Residential            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/levels-of-care/residential-inpatient-treatment/">Residential Treatment Centers</a> are available for all patients. With 24/7 support, patients can fully immerse in the recovery process with few distractions for the best outcomes. Length of stay varies based on individual need. After graduating from one of our therapeutic communities, treatment continues at an Outpatient facility best suited to each patient.</p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/levels-of-care/residential-inpatient-treatment/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/hospital.svg" class="img-svg" alt="hospital">
                                Outpatient            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p><span id="speechify-first-word-listening-nudge-root-4" style="position: absolute; z-index: 10000;"></span><span id="speechify-first-word-listening-nudge-4"><span id="speechify-first-word-listening-nudge-root-4" style="position: absolute; z-index: 10000;"></span><span id="speechify-first-word-listening-nudge-4">No matter where</span></span> the recovery journey begins, <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/levels-of-care/outpatient-programs/" data-wpel-link="internal">Outpatient Treatment Centers</a> help minimize the disruption addiction causes in a patient’s life. By participating in treatment while still being present for other areas of life, treatment and recovery are less stigmatizing. Outpatient treatment is adapted to your personal, physical, social and mental health needs.</p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/levels-of-care/outpatient-programs/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/virtual-phone.svg" class="img-svg" alt="virtual-phone">
                                Virtual            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p>Gateway Foundation offers <a href="https://gatewayconnect.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">gateway connect</a>, our virtual addiction treatment from the comfort of your home or office. Utilizing the same core evidence-based curriculum Gateway is known for, participants receive the same quality of care online.  Given today’s environment, many are not able to attend in-person programs or prefer to stay home, while still needing lifesaving addiction treatment services. A combination of group therapy, individual therapy, psycho-educational groups, assignments and other treatment modalities are used in our interactive sessions.<a href="https://gatewayconnect.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img decoding="async" class="alignleft wp-image-14949" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa.png" alt="" width="359" height="100" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa.png 934w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa-300x84.png 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa-768x214.png 768w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa-259x72.png 259w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/gatewayconnect_logo_RGB-tagline-stacked-tranpa-530x148.png 530w" sizes="(max-width: 359px) 100vw, 359px" /></a></p>
<p> </p>
<p> </p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/virtual-hub/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/bandaid.svg" class="img-svg" alt="bandaid">
                                Detox            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p>Detoxification is the process that safely and effectively helps patients withdraw from substance use. Because of the potential dangers associated with drug and alcohol detox, medical supervision is extremely important. The withdrawal and detoxing process must be constantly monitored to ensure safety and comfort for the individual.  If one does not have medical and nursing supervision, it can lead to a dangerous and sometimes fatal consequences.  This is a crucial first part in one’s recovery and can often set the direction for the outcome of the treatment experience. </p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/addiction-blog/category/drug-detox/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/recovery-house.svg" class="img-svg" alt="recovery-house">
                                Recovery Home            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p>Sober living homes are best suited to those seeking transitional housing as they recover from a substance use disorder. Cost-effective, safe, sober and healthy environments provide a place to build strength in a <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/alumni-community/" data-wpel-link="internal">recovery community</a> and establish <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/programs/addiction-therapy-services/addiction-recovery-support-groups/" data-wpel-link="internal">addiction recovery support groups</a>. Outpatient Treatment is also provided at all Gateway Recovery Homes, so when it’s time to move forward, the skills and support network remain.</p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/programs/addiction-therapy-services/addiction-recovery-support-groups/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                        <h3 class="accordion-heading">
                                <img decoding="async" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/graduation-hat.svg" class="img-svg" alt="graduation-hat">
                                Alumni Engagement            </h3>
            <div class="accordion-content">
                <p>Recovery is a lifelong process, one that requires continued commitment. Our Alumni Community provides lifetime support following intensive treatment, including social activities and educational programming to help sustain recovery for life.</p>
                                    <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/alumni-community/" class="btn btn-tertiary" target="_self">
                        LEARN MORE                    </a>
                            </div>
                    </div>

                            <img decoding="async" width="564" height="436" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/recovery-home.jpg" class="attachment- size-" alt="recovery home treatment" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/recovery-home.jpg 564w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/recovery-home-300x232.jpg 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/recovery-home-129x100.jpg 129w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/recovery-home-453x350.jpg 453w" sizes="(max-width: 564px) 100vw, 564px" />                        </div>
                        <div class="tab-text">
                            <h3>Recovery Home</h3>
                            <p>Sober living homes are best suited to those seeking transitional housing as they recover from a substance use disorder. Cost-effective, safe, sober and healthy environments provide a place to build strength in a <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/alumni-community/" data-wpel-link="internal">recovery community</a> and establish <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/programs/addiction-therapy-services/addiction-recovery-support-groups/" data-wpel-link="internal">addiction recovery support groups</a>. Outpatient Treatment is also provided at all Gateway Recovery Homes, so when it’s time to move forward, the skills and support network remain.</p>
                                                            <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/programs/addiction-therapy-services/addiction-recovery-support-groups/" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_self">
                                    LEARN MORE                                </a>
                                                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                                <div id="tab-6" class="tab-content">
                    <div class="tab-details">
                        <div class="tab-image">
                            <img decoding="async" width="563" height="435" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ongoing-support.jpg" class="attachment- size-" alt="alumni engagement ongoing support" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ongoing-support.jpg 563w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ongoing-support-300x232.jpg 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ongoing-support-129x100.jpg 129w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ongoing-support-453x350.jpg 453w" sizes="(max-width: 563px) 100vw, 563px" />                        </div>
                        <div class="tab-text">
                            <h3>Alumni Engagement</h3>
                            <p>Recovery is a lifelong process, one that requires continued commitment. Our Alumni Community provides lifetime support following intensive treatment, including social activities and educational programming to help sustain recovery for life.</p>
                                                            <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/alumni-community/" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_self">
                                    LEARN MORE                                </a>

                    <div class="half-3-imgs__txt-grp">
                                                    <h2 class="half-3-imgs__heading">Gateway Foundation Corrections</h2>
                        
                                                    <div class="js--half-3-imgs__read-more-box">
                                <div class="half-3-imgs__read-more-content">
                                    <div class="half-3-imgs__paragraph-txt"><p>Gateway Foundation Corrections is a Division of Gateway Foundation, Inc., a non-profit organization dedicated to making a real difference in the lives of the people we treat. Since 1968, we have been an industry leader in providing the answers individuals and their families need related to drug and alcohol treatment.</p>
<p>Our correctional treatment programs treat substance abusing adults involved in the criminal justice system. Our programs include in-prison treatment, community corrections outpatient care, day reporting centers and assessment and intervention programs. We also provide treatment to offenders who are challenged with a Co-Occurring mental health problem. Gateway’s drug and alcohol treatment programs are innovative, effective and cost-efficient.</p>
</div>
                                </div>

                                <button class="half-3-imgs__read-more-btn js--half-3-imgs__read-more-btn" type="button">Read <span class="half-3-imgs__read-more-btn--more">More</span><span class="half-3-imgs__read-more-btn--less">Less</span></button>
                            </div>
                        
                                                    <a class="half-3-img__cta-btn btn btn-secondary" href="https://corrections.gatewayfoundation.org/" target="_self">Learn More</a>

<section class="our-treatment">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="our-treatment-details">
            <div class="our-treatment-left">
                <div class="treatment-image hidden-lg">
                    <img decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w.jpg" class="img-responsive" alt="Happy Couple With Their Daughter After Receiving Treatment" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w.jpg 1000w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-300x200.jpg 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-768x512.jpg 768w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-150x100.jpg 150w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-525x350.jpg 525w" sizes="(max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" />                </div>
                <div class="treatment-image hidden-lg ab__accordion__img">
                                    </div>
                <div class="treatment-content">
                    <h5>OUR TREATMENTS</h5>
                    <h2>Treatment That Works</h2>
                    <p>Constantly evolving, Gateway uses evidence-based practices and leading experts to develop customized treatment plans for every patient. Drawing from proven research and a legacy of innovation, we deliver the best possible outcomes—advancing the recovery of thousands of patients and families every year. Gateway Treatment Centers provides:</p>
                </div>
                <div class="treatment-image hidden-md-down">
                    <img decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w.jpg" class="img-responsive" alt="Happy Couple With Their Daughter After Receiving Treatment" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w.jpg 1000w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-300x200.jpg 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-768x512.jpg 768w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-150x100.jpg 150w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/iStock-1041925486-1000w-525x350.jpg 525w" sizes="(max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" />                </div>
                <div class="treatment-image hidden-md-down ab__accordion__img">
                                    </div>
            </div>
            <div class="our-treatment-right">
                <div class="accordion">
                                        <h3>Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>CBT, a well-established practice is interwoven with other evidence-based practices. It focuses on changing destructive or unhealthy behavior patterns.
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/clinical-services/cognitive-behavioral-therapy/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>DBT is a skill-based approach to learning effective coping strategies that can be used to address and change unhealthy behaviors.
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/clinical-services/dialectical-behavior-therapy/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Co-Occurring Disorder Treatment</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>Co-occurring disorder treatment cares for patients who have both a substance use disorder and a mental health diagnosis such as anxiety or depression. 
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/what-we-treat/co-occurring-and-dual-diagnosis-services/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Medication-Assisted Recovery (MAR)</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>MAR is using FDA-Approved medications such as Suboxone and Vivitrol to help manage withdrawal symptoms and cravings associated with substance use disorders.
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/programs/medication-assisted-treatment-program/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Mindfulness-Based Sobriety</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>Developed at Gateway, Mindfulness-Based Sobriety is an integrated approach to substance use disorder treatment that focuses on helping patients build the skills to be more present and ultimately create positive change. 
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/clinical-services/mindfulness-based-sobriety/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Motivational Interviewing (MI)</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>MI helps patients recognize the need for change and how to move past the physical, psychological and social reasons for substance use. This practice keeps patients accountable to their treatment and recovery.
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/clinical-services/motivational-interviewing/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                        <h3>Seeking Safety</h3>
                    <div class="accordion-content">
                        <p>This coping skills therapy is specifically designed for survivors of trauma with substance use disorders. By learning to cope in the present instead of focusing on trauma of the past, survivors of trauma can heal and address substance use at the same time.
<br><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/programs-services/clinical-services/trauma-therapy/">Learn More</a></p>
                    </div>
                                    </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="left-video-right-text">
    <div class="left-video">
        <div class="left-video-wrapper">
            <a class="video-image external" data-fancybox="" href="https://vimeo.com/358382325" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
                <img decoding="async" width="1383" height="769" src="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506.jpg" class="attachment- size-" alt="POWER OF ADDICTION MEDICINE" srcset="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506.jpg 1383w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-300x167.jpg 300w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-1024x569.jpg 1024w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-768x427.jpg 768w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-180x100.jpg 180w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-530x295.jpg 530w, https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/iStock-1142334506-1320x734.jpg 1320w" sizes="(max-width: 1383px) 100vw, 1383px" />                <span class="icon"><i class="icon-play"></i></span>
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="right-text">
        <div class="right-text-wrapper">
            <h3><span style="color: #000000;">Lasting recovery takes more than hope.</span> It takes science. It takes Addiction Medicine.</h3>
<p>Addiction is a disease—and lives are at stake. At Gateway, Addiction Medicine is a holistic approach that uses evidence-based practices. Those practices include therapy and medication, in combination with compassionate patient engagement. At Gateway we treat each person’s unique physical, social and emotional needs.</p>
<p><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/about-gateway-foundation/faqs/what-is-addiction-medicine/">Addiction Medicine</a> is what we practice at Gateway. Our highly skilled and accredited clinical and medical professionals deliver personalized treatment plans for patients at any stage of recovery. Gateway Treatment Centers also treat those with complex needs such as trauma and mental health disorders.</p>
<p>Our style of Addiction Medicine empowers our patients’ <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/blog/category/success-stories/">lifelong successes</a> and our proven outcomes. Gateway has seen more than 1 million graduates over the last five decades. That’s 1 million lives—and their families—forever changed.</p>
            <div class="quote">
                THAT’S THE POWER OF ADDICTION MEDICINE. SAVING LIVES.            </div>
            <p><a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/contact-gateway-foundation/">Contact Gateway</a> for a consultation and begin your journey to recovery.</p>
            <a href="https://www.gatewayfoundation.org/contact-gateway-foundation/" class="btn btn-primary" target="_self">
                CONTACT US            </a>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

			jQuery(this).find(':input[type=submit]').prop('disabled', true);

			jQuery(this).find(':input[type=submit]').css("padding","14px 42px 14px 42px");
			var wpcf7Elm = document.querySelector('.wpcf7');

				jQuery('.wpcf7-submit').prop("disabled", false);
				jQuery(this).find(':input[type=submit]').val('SEND');
				jQuery(this).find(':input[type=submit]').css("padding","14px 60px 14px 60px");
			}, false);
			wpcf7Elm.addEventListener('wpcf7invalid', function() {

</script><!-- --------- START PLUGIN REVENUECLOUDFX-WP - INTEGRATION SCRIPTS --------- -->

<script>
// single form - HubSpot iframe form
if (
    /* global mcfx */
    'undefined' !== typeof mcfx
    && 'undefined' !== typeof window.mcfxCaptureCustomFormData
) {
    // Reference https://legacydocs.hubspot.com/global-form-events
    window.addEventListener( 'message', ( event ) => {
        if (
            event.data.type === 'hsFormCallback' &&
            event.data.eventName === 'onFormSubmit'
        ) {
            let hsFormId = 'hsForm_' + event.data.id;
            if(hsFormId == 'hsForm_6f8b4e49-3361-4ce0-a822-85e9a7dab694') {
                window.mcfxCaptureCustomFormData(event.data.data, hsFormId);
            }
        }
    } );
}
window.mcfxCaptureCustomFormData = function( data, formId ) {
    var formEl = document.createElement('form');
    formEl.id = formId;
    Object.keys(data).map(function(key){
        var fieldEl = document.createElement('input');
        fieldEl.type = 'hidden';
        fieldEl.name = data[key].name;
        fieldEl.value = data[key].value;
        formEl.appendChild(fieldEl);
    })
    mcfx( 'capture', formEl );
}
</script>
<!-- --------- END PLUGIN REVENUECLOUDFX-WP - CUSTOM FOOTER SCRIPTS --------- -->

 What are you looking for? 
 
 
 SEARCH 
 
 

 

 

 Menu 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Get the addiction treatment you or your loved one needs today

 
Get the addiction treatment you or your loved one needs today

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 Call Now 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 All Major Insurances Accepted

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 SEE ALL 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 Comprehensive Treatment Options

 
Gateway offers a full continuum of care across a wide range of clinical settings, so no matter where a patient is in life or recovery, we have a program that can be personalized for them. It’s care that stays for life.

 

 

 

 
 Residential 

 

 
 Residential Treatment Centers are available for all patients. With 24/7 support, patients can fully immerse in the recovery process with few distractions for the best outcomes. Length of stay varies based on individual need. After graduating from one of our therapeutic communities, treatment continues at an Outpatient facility best suited to each patient.

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 Outpatient 

 

 
 No matter where the recovery journey begins,  Outpatient Treatment Centers help minimize the disruption addiction causes in a patient’s life. By participating in treatment while still being present for other areas of life, treatment and recovery are less stigmatizing. Outpatient treatment is adapted to your personal, physical, social and mental health needs.

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 Virtual 

 

 
Gateway Foundation offers gateway connect , our virtual addiction treatment from the comfort of your home or office. Utilizing the same core evidence-based curriculum Gateway is known for, participants receive the same quality of care online.  Given today’s environment, many are not able to attend in-person programs or prefer to stay home, while still needing lifesaving addiction treatment services. A combination of group therapy, individual therapy, psycho-educational groups, assignments and other treatment modalities are used in our interactive sessions. 

 

 

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 Detox 

 

 
Detoxification is the process that safely and effectively helps patients withdraw from substance use. Because of the potential dangers associated with drug and alcohol detox, medical supervision is extremely important. The withdrawal and detoxing process must be constantly monitored to ensure safety and comfort for the individual.  If one does not have medical and nursing supervision, it can lead to a dangerous and sometimes fatal consequences.  This is a crucial first part in one’s recovery and can often set the direction for the outcome of the treatment experience. 

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 Recovery Home 

 

 
Sober living homes are best suited to those seeking transitional housing as they recover from a substance use disorder. Cost-effective, safe, sober and healthy environments provide a place to build strength in a  recovery community  and establish  addiction recovery support groups . Outpatient Treatment is also provided at all Gateway Recovery Homes, so when it’s time to move forward, the skills and support network remain.

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 Alumni Engagement 

 

 
Recovery is a lifelong process, one that requires continued commitment. Our Alumni Community provides lifetime support following intensive treatment, including social activities and educational programming to help sustain recovery for life.

 
 LEARN MORE

Outpatient Treatment is also provided at all Gateway Recovery Homes, so when it’s time to move forward, the skills and support network remain.

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Alumni Engagement

 
Recovery is a lifelong process, one that requires continued commitment. Our Alumni Community provides lifetime support following intensive treatment, including social activities and educational programming to help sustain recovery for life.

 
 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Gateway Foundation Corrections

 
 

 

 

Gateway Foundation Corrections is a Division of Gateway Foundation, Inc., a non-profit organization dedicated to making a real difference in the lives of the people we treat. Since 1968, we have been an industry leader in providing the answers individuals and their families need related to drug and alcohol treatment.

Our correctional treatment programs treat substance abusing adults involved in the criminal justice system. Our programs include in-prison treatment, community corrections outpatient care, day reporting centers and assessment and intervention programs. We also provide treatment to offenders who are challenged with a Co-Occurring mental health problem. Gateway’s drug and alcohol treatment programs are innovative, effective and cost-efficient.

 

 Read More Less 
 

 
 Learn More 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
PERSONALIZED SOLUTIONS

 
Recovery Made Real

 
Gateway Treatment Centers’ customized drug treatment programs in Illinois meet the needs of diverse populations. We work with every individual to create the right treatment plan suited to them. That’s our Gateway rehab personal touch.

 

 

 
 View All SOLUTIONS 
 

 

 

 
 
 Gambling Addiction 

 
 Women’s Trauma 

 
 Professional’s Program 

 
 DUI Programs

Gambling Addiction

Professional’s Program

 
Our professional program is for working adults balancing recovery and life’s responsibilities. 

 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
DUI Programs

 

 
DUI Programs

 
Our DUI services educate offenders on the dangers of driving under the influence and help them complete court-ordered classes to obtain a driving license. 

 LEARN MORE 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Locations

 

Gateway is a national provider that has 16 convenient drug and alcohol treatment centers in Illinois to serve our patients in the places and communities they call home.

OUR TREATMENTS

 
Treatment That Works

 
Constantly evolving, Gateway uses evidence-based practices and leading experts to develop customized treatment plans for every patient. Drawing from proven research and a legacy of innovation, we deliver the best possible outcomes—advancing the recovery of thousands of patients and families every year. Gateway Treatment Centers provides:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)

 

 
CBT, a well-established practice is interwoven with other evidence-based practices. It focuses on changing destructive or unhealthy behavior patterns.

 Learn More 

 

 
Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)

 

 
DBT is a skill-based approach to learning effective coping strategies that can be used to address and change unhealthy behaviors.

 Learn More 

 

 
Co-Occurring Disorder Treatment

 

 
Co-occurring disorder treatment cares for patients who have both a substance use disorder and a mental health diagnosis such as anxiety or depression. 

 Learn More 

 

 
Medication-Assisted Recovery (MAR)

 

 
MAR is using FDA-Approved medications such as Suboxone and Vivitrol to help manage withdrawal symptoms and cravings associated with substance use disorders.

 Learn More 

 

 
Mindfulness-Based Sobriety

 

 
Developed at Gateway, Mindfulness-Based Sobriety is an integrated approach to substance use disorder treatment that focuses on helping patients build the skills to be more present and ultimately create positive change. 

 Learn More 

 

 
Motivational Interviewing (MI)

 

 
MI helps patients recognize the need for change and how to move past the physical, psychological and social reasons for substance use. This practice keeps patients accountable to their treatment and recovery.

 Learn More 

 

 
Seeking Safety

 

 
This coping skills therapy is specifically designed for survivors of trauma with substance use disorders. By learning to cope in the present instead of focusing on trauma of the past, survivors of trauma can heal and address substance use at the same time.

 Learn More 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 Lasting recovery takes more than hope. It takes science. It takes Addiction Medicine.

Addiction is a disease—and lives are at stake. At Gateway, Addiction Medicine is a holistic approach that uses evidence-based practices. Those practices include therapy and medication, in combination with compassionate patient engagement. At Gateway we treat each person’s unique physical, social and emotional needs.

 Addiction Medicine  is what we practice at Gateway. Our highly skilled and accredited clinical and medical professionals deliver personalized treatment plans for patients at any stage of recovery. Gateway Treatment Centers also treat those with complex needs such as trauma and mental health disorders.

Our style of Addiction Medicine empowers our patients’  lifelong successes  and our proven outcomes. Gateway has seen more than 1 million graduates over the last five decades. That’s 1 million lives—and their families—forever changed.

 

 THAT’S THE POWER OF ADDICTION MEDICINE. SAVING LIVES. 

 
 Contact Gateway  for a consultation and begin your journey to recovery.

rawMentions: Intensive Outpatient Treatment for Substance Abuse
After graduating from one of our therapeutic communities, treatment continues at an Outpatient facility best suited to each patient.
No matter where the recovery journey begins, Outpatient Treatment Centers help minimize the disruption addiction causes in a patient’s life.
Outpatient treatment is adapted to your personal, physical, social and mental health needs.
Outpatient Treatment is also provided at all Gateway Recovery Homes, so when it’s time to move forward, the skills and support network remain.
Our programs include in-prison treatment, community corrections outpatient care, day reporting centers and assessment and intervention programs.
After 30 days inpatient treatment and 9 months outpatient I was able to achieve that goal.
